name: UAL Corporation (United Airlines)
description: United Airlines Holdings, Inc. is a major American airline holding company headquartered in Chicago, Illinois. As the parent company of United Airlines, it operates an extensive global network, providing air transportation services for passengers and cargo across North America, South America, Europe, Asia, and the Pacific. Utilizing a hub-and-spoke model, the company connects millions of travelers to hundreds of destinations worldwide. United is committed to delivering leading customer service, operational excellence, and sustainable long-term value while maintaining a significant presence in the global aviation industry through its mainline and regional fleet operations.
